Program_Name: Maternal Child and Adolescent Health (MCAH) Program
Program_Description: Lake County’s MCAH Program is dedicated to promoting physical, social, and emotional health and well-being for pregnant persons, children, adolescents, and their families through information, education, and resources.
Target_Population: Pregnant persons, children, adolescents, and their families

Program_Description: An evidenced-based program designed to support pregnant and parenting families in the community.
Target_Population: Pregnant and parenting families with low incomes, families with children aged 0-3 months.
Eligibility_Requirements: Pregnant or postpartum parents with low incomes; families with children aged 0-3 months with low incomes.
